title: SCP-457, The Burning Man
description: It's getting hot here. The Burning Man is on its way to grill you alive...
body:
The Burning Man adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-457, also known as The Burning Man.


SCP-457 appears as a single flame that takes the shape of a humanoid figure. SCP-457 can leave a trail of fire and uses its fiery attacks to kill anyone. If it comes in contact with water, it will be extinguished and no longer cause fire damage. You may also find SCP-457 in its smaller flame form. If you get too close to this flame, it can grow into its full, terrifying humanoid state, ready to burn you alive.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-457 spawn?

SCP-457 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-457.

► How can I disable Fire placement by SCP-457?

You can turn off SCP-457 Fire placement when setting the gamerule "burningManSetsFire" to false.

</details>



![SCP-457](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a01f6ec997bd97814e06db19e90f5e3044c0be22.png)

SCP-457 is a flame entity that takes on the shape of a human. It leaves a trail of fire wherever it goes and is extremely dangerous. When SCP-457 attacks, players are set on fire, and it can also launch fire projectiles or heat up the surrounding area. Nearby coal blocks are destroyed, and water turns into magma, similar to the Frost Walker effect. However, SCP-457 is vulnerable to water. If it comes into contact with water or rain, it will extinguish, losing the ability to use fire-based attacks. When killed, SCP-457 dissolves into smoke and ash.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
